ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who created the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated number of hours required to complete the task */,
  "parent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent task (if the task is a subtask) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_parent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager who assigned the task */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the task assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the team member */,
  "reporting_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member's reporting manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_reporting_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_manager_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the hours are being logged for */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member logging the hours */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the hours were logged */,
  "hours" REAL /* Number of hours spent on the task on the given date */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the work done during the logged hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_hours_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_hours_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment is related to */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member making the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if the comment is a reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_manager_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being assigned */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the project manager was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who assigned the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_manager_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_manager_assignments_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_manager_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained within the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
